scripts.build: corepack pnpm -r --filter @kalio/types --filter @kalio/sdk --filter kalio-api --filter kalio-web run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @kalio/types run build && corepack pnpm -r --filter @kalio/types --filter @kalio/sdk --filter kalio-api --filter kalio-web run typecheck
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm -r --filter kalio-api --filter kalio-web run lint
scripts.clean: corepack pnpm -r --filter @kalio/types --filter @kalio/sdk --filter kalio-api --filter kalio-web run clean
